creator: h@hartzer.sh
text:
Hi Rainer,

Thanks for looking into this!

On two different 14.1 AMD64 machines using quarterly, I ran pkg update, then pkg search qgis, and it comes back blank.

I am wondering if other packages didn't build as well, but I'm not sure.

It seems like main might have a package now for 3.38.1_2: https://www.freshports.org/graphics/qgis

None for quarterly (FreeBSD 13 or 14), though, which I think most people use.

I think it may be a similar situation for qgis-ltr.

-Henrich
